summary: Lead accepts the M1 milestone exit gate after systems_architect PASS and independent qa_reviewer ACCEPT. docs/GATE-M1.md records SIM-001 through SIM-006 CLOSED, PR #22/#23 CI and merge evidence, local validation, and explicit non-blocking follow-ups for literal Chromium/Electron host hash extraction and M2 content-runtime boot-boundary tests. M1-GATE remains ACCEPTED, not CLOSED, until this gate PR enters main; current_milestone remains M1 until post-merge closure.

format:check, lint, recursive typecheck, and architecture:check passed; self-test fixture produced 15 expected violations.

decisions: Accept M1-GATE but do not mark it CLOSED until the gate PR is merged into main.
Keep current_milestone as M1 in this branch; advance to M2 only in the post-merge closure commit.
Preserve host-hash and content-runtime boot-boundary items as explicit follow-up risks, not blockers for M1.
Closed systems_architect thread 019ef928-9fe5-7402-9535-455ef447bce1 and qa_reviewer thread 019ef935-cf7b-7a01-84ad-8481eeeed937 after ACCEPT.
risks: FOLLOW_UP_REQUIRED before M2 exit or any platform-host determinism claim: add explicit Chromium plus Electron host hash canary.
FOLLOW_UP_REQUIRED during M2 content/world integration: add sim-core/content-runtime boot-boundary contract test.
Known non-blocking MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON warning remains in the Worker fixture test path.
requested_action: Commit and merge the accepted M1-GATE evidence. After it enters main, close M1-GATE and advance current_milestone to M2 in a post-merge closure commit.
